content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 27, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 27 focused on advancing the monetization framework for Eliza Cloud, including pay-as-you-go container hosting and credit balance management. Additionally, the team expanded Milady LifeOps capabilities by adding Google Calendar management and performed routine maintenance via branch merges.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Monetization and Billing Infrastructure**
    *   Implemented pay-as-you-go container hosting, allowing hosting bills to be paid directly from org earnings before credit balances ([#477](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/477)).
    *   Reworked `appCreditsService` to support debiting org credit balances and rebuilt the app-auth consent flow ([#474](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/474), [#478](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/478)).
*   **Milady LifeOps Enhancements**
    *   Added `GET /api/v1/milady/google/calendar/calendars` to enable listing managed Google calendars, addressing a connector gap ([#472](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/472)).
*   **Repository Maintenance**
    *   Synchronized `dev` to `main` branches to ensure codebase consistency ([#475](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/475), [#476](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/476)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#479](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/479): ci: add migration diagnostics to backend deploy.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#79](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/79) Dependency Dashboard**
    *   The dashboard is currently tracking pending updates for Bun, Capacitor, Rollup, Rimraf, TypeScript, and Node.js. 
    *   Recent activity includes the forced creation of 6 pending Renovate updates. 
    *   Cleanup of non-existent files has been performed, and the team is awaiting the next CI run to verify if major version bumps (TS6, Node 24, Rimraf 6) are stable.
